title: Upgrade SQLAlchemy from 1.4 to 2.0
description: Upgrades SQLAlchemy to 2.0 and updates the session and query patterns to the new 2.0-style API.
diff:
diff --git a/requirements.txt b/requirements.txt
index 1a2b3c4..d5e6f7a 100644
--- a/requirements.txt
+++ b/requirements.txt
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 flask==3.0.0
-sqlalchemy==1.4.50
+sqlalchemy==2.0.23
 alembic==1.13.0
 psycopg2-binary==2.9.9
diff --git a/database/session.py b/database/session.py
index 2b3c4d5..e6f7a8b 100644
--- a/database/session.py
+++ b/database/session.py
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 from sqlalchemy import create_engine
-from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
 
 engine = create_engine("postgresql://localhost/myapp")
-SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
+SessionLocal = Session(engine)
comments: adam: Big upgrade, but necessary. Approve with caveat that we test thoroughly.
beth: LGTM, the 2.0 API is much cleaner.
author: carl
